global_thesis: The manuscript advances a staged account of the central problem.
repetition_map: The introduction and first chapter repeat the stakes in similar language.

concept_tracking.continuity_issue: Later use is broader than the first definition.

contradictions_or_tensions: The proposal promises a narrow claim while the chapter draft implies a broader one.
tone_and_audience_consistency: The manuscript is mostly research-focused but occasionally shifts into promotional phrasing.
suggested_restructuring: Move repeated stakes language into the introduction only.
priority_revision_list: Align chapter-level claims with the global thesis.
